# MindCradle — AI-Compounding Wellness Platform

> Target URL: https://mindcradle.online
> Developer Spec Reference: project details/BRAIN.md
> Marketing Pitch: An AI companion that quietly learns from your days, connects moments across time, and compiles a lifelong Personal Knowledge Graph (PKG) to track your personal growth.

## 🔗 Quick Links
- [Dashboard](https://mindcradle.online/dashboard)
- [Daily Rituals](https://mindcradle.online/morning)
- [Mindfulness Blog](https://mindcradle.online/blog)
- [Developer Documentation](https://mindcradle.online/docs)
- [Privacy Policy](https://mindcradle.online/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://mindcradle.online/terms)

---

## 🔌 MCP Integration Card

If you are writing code for MindCradle using an MCP-compatible IDE (like Cursor, VS Code, or Windsurf), the following servers allow direct environment control:

- **Supabase Local MCP**: Used to run SQL migrations, inspect Postgres schema, or manage local testing databases.
- **Cloud Run MCP**: Deployment control for the backend container image.
  - Project ID: `mindcradle01` (Region: `europe-west1`)
  - Target Service: `mindcradle01`
  - Command: `gcloud run services update mindcradle01 --region=europe-west1 --update-env-vars ...`

---

## 🤖 Agent Skills & Use Cases

This section describes the full capability of the MindCradle backend as functional AI skills. Any LLM Agent reading this can call these interfaces to fulfill user wellness queries.

### Skill 1: Relationship Memory Extraction & Sync (`/aria/knowledge/process`)
- **Capability**: Analyze unstructured user journal entries, mood notes, or chat history to extract entities (people, places, goals, stressors, coping mechanisms) and build semantic edges (triggers, helps_with, correlates_with).
- **Use Case**: When a user writes *"I felt anxious about my presentation today, but doing 5 mins of breathing helped"* → call this skill to extract the node `presentation` (stressor), `breathing` (coping), and edge `breathing` --[helps_with]--> `presentation`.

### Skill 2: Longitudinal Growth Measurement (`/aria/knowledge/growth`)
- **Capability**: Retrieve scores across 10 distinct psychological and behavioral dimensions (Self-Awareness, Emotional Stability, Coping Efficacy, Ritual Consistency, etc.) calculated nightly based on PKG evidence counts and valence levels.
- **Use Case**: When the user asks *"How have my coping mechanisms improved over the past month?"* or *"Am I getting more resilient?"*.

### Skill 3: Life Chapter Identification (`/aria/knowledge/chapters`)
- **Capability**: Fetch the list of chronological eras in the user's life (e.g., *The Transition*, *Finding My Rhythm*) detected dynamically through clustering algorithms and emotional transitions.
- **Use Case**: When generating milestone review digests or contextualizing solstice reflections.

### Skill 4: Hybrid Semantic Search & Recall (`/ai/search`)
- **Capability**: Cosine-similarity pgvector retrieval coupled with full-text keyword matching to find specific memories across the user's past journals, mood logs, and ARIA conversations.
- **Use Case**: Answering query strings like *"When did I first mention my new project?"* or *"What was I worried about in January?"*.

### Skill 5: Dynamic Ritual Guidance (`/rituals/morning/prompt` & `/rituals/winddown/prompt`)
- **Capability**: Formulate contextual anchor questions and mindfulness prompts matching the user's current goals and active stressors in the Personal Knowledge Graph.
- **Use Case**: guiding the user through daily check-in screens with highly targeted, variable relief.

---

## 📖 API Catalog

All endpoints require JWT Bearer authentication in the `Authorization` header (`Bearer <TOKEN>`), except for health checks and auth registration/login.

### 🔐 Authentication (`/api/auth`)
- **`POST /api/auth/signup`**: Register a new user profile.
  - *Request Body*: `{"email": "...", "password": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"access_token": "...", "refresh_token": "..."}`
- **`POST /api/auth/login`**: Authenticate credentials.
  - *Request Body*: `{"email": "...", "password": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"access_token": "...", "refresh_token": "..."}`
- **`POST /api/auth/forgot-password`**: Trigger reset email via Resend.
  - *Request Body*: `{"email": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`POST /api/auth/reset-password`**: Overwrite password using token.
  - *Request Body*: `{"token": "...", "new_password": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`POST /api/auth/verify-age`**: Age verification gate (18+).
  - *Request Body*: `{"dob": "YYYY-MM-DD"}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true, "verified": true}`
- **`POST /api/auth/privacy-accepted`**: Record privacy policy agreement.
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`

### 📈 Mood Logs (`/api/mood`)
- **`POST /api/mood`**: Log daily mood level.
  - *Request Body*: `{"level": 1-10, "notes": "...", "emotions": ["anxious", "calm"]}`
  - *Response*: `MoodEntryResponse`
- **`GET /api/mood`**: Retrieve paginated mood history.
  - *Query Params*: `range=7d|30d|all`
  - *Response*: `list[MoodEntryResponse]`
- **`GET /api/mood/trends`**: Get aggregate emotional distributions over time.
  - *Response*: `EmotionTrendsResponse`

### 🧘 Journal (`/api/journal`)
- **`POST /api/journal`**: Save guided journal entry.
  - *Request Body*: `{"content": "...", "prompt_id": "...", "ambient_audio": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `JournalResponse`
- **`GET /api/journal`**: Fetch all user journal logs.
  - *Response*: `list[JournalResponse]`

### ☀ Daily Rituals (`/api/rituals`)
- **`GET /api/rituals`**: Retrieve status of today's rituals.
  - *Response*: `{"morning_completed": bool, "wind_down_completed": bool}`
- **`POST /api/rituals/morning`**: Save morning checklist and intentions.
  - *Request Body*: `{"intention": "...", "predicted_mood": 1-10, "activity_id": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`POST /api/rituals/winddown`**: Save evening letting-go reflection.
  - *Request Body*: `{"let_go_items": ["..."], "gratitudes": ["..."], "ambient_audio": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`GET /api/rituals/morning/prompt`**: Get dynamic anchor focus matching active chapter/goals.
  - *Response*: `{"prompt": "..."}`
- **`GET /api/rituals/winddown/prompt`**: Get dynamic let-go question matching active stressors.
  - *Response*: `{"prompt": "..."}`

### ✦ ARIA & Semantic Search (`/api/ai` & `/api/aria`)
- **`POST /api/ai/chat`**: Talk to ARIA (injects PKG memories context).
  - *Request Body*: `{"message": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `AIChatResponse` (stream support available)
- **`POST /api/ai/remember-context`**: Manually record a specific thought/memory.
  - *Request Body*: `{"memory_text": "...", "category": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`GET /api/ai/timeline`**: Fetch paginated historical event stream (moods, journals, milestones).
  - *Query Params*: `page=1`, `page_size=30`, `types=mood,journal`, `q=keyword`
  - *Response*: `TimelinePage`
- **`GET /api/ai/search`**: Run hybrid vector + keyword semantic search.
  - *Query Params*: `q=search+query`, `limit=15`, `types=mood,journal`
  - *Response*: `SearchPage`
- **`GET /api/ai/search/suggestions`**: Fetch 6 custom query suggestions based on user data.
  - *Response*: `{"suggestions": ["..."]}`
- **`POST /api/ai/embeddings/generate`**: Trigger bulk embedding sync for timeline events.
  - *Response*: `{"total": 100, "embedded": 100}`

### 🧠 Knowledge Graph / CIE (`/api/aria/knowledge`)
- **`POST /api/aria/knowledge/process`**: Extract PKG nodes and edges.
  - *Request Body*: `{"source_type": "journal|mood|chat", "source_id": "...", "text": "..."}`
  - *Response*: `{"success": true, "nodes_processed": 5}`
- **`GET /api/aria/knowledge/graph`**: Retrieve user's active nodes and edges.
  - *Response*: `KnowledgeGraphResponse`
- **`GET /api/aria/knowledge/growth`**: Get 10-dimensional growth metrics scores.
  - *Response*: `GrowthMetricsResponse`
- **`DELETE /api/aria/knowledge/nodes/{node_id}`**: Delete a knowledge node from PKG.
  - *Response*: `{"success": true}`
- **`PATCH /api/aria/knowledge/nodes/{node_id}`**: Edit a node's parameters (e.g. archive, label, valence).
  - *Request Body*: `{"label": "...", "is_archived": bool, "valence": float}`
  - *Response*: `KnowledgeNodeResponse`
- **`GET /api/aria/knowledge/chapters`**: Get list of life chapters.
  - *Response*: `KnowledgeChaptersListResponse`
- **`GET /api/aria/knowledge/comparison`**: Get chapter-over-chapter metric deltas and progress comparison.
  - *Response*: `KnowledgeComparisonResponse`
